programme.title: BKFC 49: Slaveski vs. Lindsey
programme.desc: Gorjan Slaveski vs. Jake Lindsey, welterweight championship bout; Bryce Henry vs. Tom Shoaff, lightweight. From Miami-Dade Fairgrounds in Miami-Dade County, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 50: Hunt vs. Camozzi
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Chris Camozzi, cruiserweight championship bout; Keegan Vandermeer vs. Tyler Winemiller; Andrew Yates vs. Christian Torres, welterweight. From 1st Bank Center in Denver.

programme.title: BKFC 57
programme.desc: Ryan Reber vs. Derek Perez, bantamweight; Stephen Townsel vs. Leo Bercier, cruiserweight; Matt Russo vs. Justin Street, flyweight. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete
programme.sub-title: Big Mountain Descent and Biking Begins
programme.desc: The athletes transition to the Big Mountain Descent and start an Air DH flow bike race.

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete
programme.sub-title: Downhill Biking & Free Skiing Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The athletes continue with the downhill bike race high and navigate a free ski contest back on Red Mountain 3.

programme.title: Ultimate Mountain Athlete
programme.desc: The first season concludes with the Free Ski contest and crowning the Ultimate Mountain Athlete champion.

programme.desc: Two Aussies embark on an adventure of a lifetime by taking on the challenge to surf in all 28 states of India!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: From Portland’s food scene to remote boat-building and legendary lobster hauls.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR's highly trained volunteers drop everything to rescue the injured in their community.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search and Rescue races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny travels to the Portuguese village of Nazaré to train with big wave charger Lucas 'Chumbo' Chianca.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny competes in the Gigantes de Nazaré contest in Portugal before jetting home to Maui.

programme.title: No Days Off
programme.desc: Sasha travels to Manikia, a small village in Greece, to experience an emerging climbing destination.

programme.title: No Days Off
programme.desc: Sasha travels to the unlikely climbing destination of the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.desc: Biju heads to Alabama’s Beaches to sample southern fare at its freshest.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.sub-title: South Shore of Lake Tahoe, California
programme.desc: Biju visits the South Shore of Lake Tahoe to experience the area's stunning landscape and bountiful cuisine.

programme.title: The Outer Edge: Part 1
programme.desc: Explore the heart and soul of the Outer Banks of North Carolina through the stories of OBX locals.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.desc: Carrying water is a hassle on long runs, so I’ve built a robot cooler that follows me on the road and trail.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: Jet Powered MTB vs Solar E-Bike
programme.desc: Let’s retrofit a mountain bike with a jet engine and see how fast I can go uphill!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: From Portland’s food scene to remote boat-building and legendary lobster hauls.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Beat Monday is a series of epic weekend adventures to see what's possible between Friday and Monday.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to Nevada to explore the trails and mountains around the beautiful Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Beat Monday is a series of epic weekend adventures to see what's possible between Friday and Monday.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jay head to Yosemite National Park to take on the Tuolumne Triple crown.
